systems: Multiple dashboard shells: admin, operations, learning, communications, initiatives

pass2_recommendation: NOT READY until Steve reviews P0/P1, duplicates, documented/scaffolded lists and accepts Pass 1 record.
method_limitations: Classifications use static inventory matching (routes, libs, docs, scripts), not live browser journeys.
CERTIFIED PRESENT threshold almost never met without Pass 2 journey + Pass 8 production proof — by design.
